steps.title: Find evidence of increase
steps.content: The researcher needs an example of a lake whose ice duration increased, so the evidence must compare the same lake in 1980-81 and 2005-06. A high count in only one winter cannot establish a trend.

steps.title: Require a two-year comparison
steps.content: Choices A and B give only one time point, so neither proves a change. Choice D says both named lakes increased, but that overstates the graph. The remaining choice directly compares one lake across the two winters. The answer is C.
